description: The `is .Variant` operator applied to an ENUM-typed left operand does not fire E-TYPE-062 (§18.17). `role` is typed `Role` (an enum); `role is .Admin` is a well-typed discrimination, so E-TYPE-062 stays silent. The clean twin of e-type-062-is-non-enum-lhs-pos.
rationale: §18.17 `is .Variant` is well-typed over an enum-typed LHS; E-TYPE-062 fires only when the LHS is not enum-typed.
